purpose: DebugTunnel end-to-end generation canaries that verify native macOS AIWizard apps use macOS Lego components and pass playground build/run signals.

cases.goal: Build a polished native macOS Wordle Clone using the Native macOS Lego components. It must use a five-letter grid, physical keyboard input, on-screen keyboard with ENTER and DELETE, offline word list, status feedback, and launch smoke-test stdout. Mandatory: copy the selected macOS components verbatim, include mchatai-macos-components-used.json for recipe.native-word-game, and keep app-specific SwiftUI in separate glue files.

Build a polished native macOS NYT Mini Crossword Clone using the Native macOS Lego components. It should have a 5x5 crossword grid, numbered starts, across/down clue list, keyboard entry, delete, selected-cell highlighting, active-clue highlighting, timer, and solved feedback. Mandatory: copy selected macOS components verbatim, include mchatai-macos-components-used.json for recipe.native-crossword, and keep SwiftUI view glue separate from copied components.

Build a polished native macOS Asteroids Clone using the Native macOS Lego components. It should have vector ship rotation, thrust inertia, bullets, asteroid splitting, lives, score, best score, keyboard controls, and a crisp retro HUD. Mandatory: copy selected macOS components verbatim, include mchatai-macos-components-used.json for recipe.arcade-asteroids, and keep rendering/input glue separate from copied engine files.

Build a polished native macOS BlackJack Clone using the Native macOS Lego components. It should have a deck, visible cards, dealer hand, hit, stand, betting chips, bankroll, settlement status, and keyboard shortcuts. Mandatory: copy selected macOS components verbatim, include mchatai-macos-components-used.json for recipe.blackjack, and keep table UI glue separate from copied card engine files.

Build a polished native macOS playable Chess Clone using the Native macOS Lego components. It should have an 8x8 board, piece rendering, selected square, legal move highlights, turn prompts, check/checkmate messaging, reset, and keyboard or click controls. Mandatory: copy selected macOS components verbatim, include mchatai-macos-components-used.json for recipe.chess, and keep SwiftUI board glue separate from copied rules files.

Build a polished native macOS Checkers Clone using the Native macOS Lego components. It should have an 8x8 board, legal move highlights, captures, king me, turns, reset, and a mono visual style. Mandatory: copy selected macOS components verbatim, include mchatai-macos-components-used.json for recipe.checkers, and keep SwiftUI board glue separate from copied rules files.
